title: Rocketman Closes In
description: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Kaku, Zoro, Nami. The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: They disconnected the last two cars!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: How could you let that happen!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Got trapped in the disconNected CARS!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: and everyone here in the 2nd car.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Are you gonna try to stop us?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: YEA!!! _____ I'll stop you!!! SASASA SASA!

summary: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
